productDisplayName: Femella Women Pink Layered Frilly Chiffon Top
description: Style NoteStrikingly chic, this top from femella is a detail-oriented deconstruction of a wardrobe essential. Offering a flowy silhouette, you can pair ths one with a pencil skirt or a pair of jeans for a casual to semi formal look. Strappy sandals for your feet is what we would say complements the look best. Product DetailsPink layered frilly printed top, made of blended fabric, has a round neckline, is sleeveless, has ruffles on the front, a button closure at the back and an elasticated hemMaterial and CareBlended fabricWash dark colours separatelyDry inside outDo not bleach or wringWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") wears a size M
